hero_desc: Analyze thousands of comments across dozens of videos in seconds. Catch hidden profanities, compile audience questions, and grow your channel rapidly.
feat_desc: See far beyond what your audience is saying.
feat_1_desc: Understand your audience by reporting the general sentiment (positive/negative) in percentages.
feat_2_desc: Accurately catch comments containing hidden or disguised profanities and insults.
feat_3_desc: Get summarized lists of what your followers expect from you or what they dislike.
feat_4_desc: Automatically list critical questions asked by your audience for your next Q&A video.
feat_5_desc: Download all analysis data anytime with a single click as a sleek Excel (XLSX) report.
feat_6_desc: Easily expose fake or duplicate spam comments from bot accounts.
price_desc: Choose the plan that fits your needs and start analyzing immediately. No hidden fees or contracts.
login_subtitle: Log in to your account to continue your analyses.
signup_subtitle: Create your free account to turn your YouTube data into intelligence.
db_subtitle: Would you like to create a new analysis request?
db_no_credit_desc: Purchase a plan to perform new analyses. Upgrade now and continue without interruption!

db_req_info: * Your request will be sent to our system and your report will be uploaded here shortly.

site_title: VidInsight | Professional YouTube Comment Analysis System
pkg_single_desc: Ideal for those who want to see general reactions to a specific video.
pkg_creator_desc: Continuous analysis of 5 videos per month for regular content creators.
pkg_agency_desc: Large analysis capacity for professional channels or brands.
footer_desc: The smartest way to turn your YouTube comments into data and strategy.
